title: Taiko fully restores cross-chain bridge just 10 days after a $1.7 million hack
summary: The protocol completed a multi-stage recovery that included an independent security review. The TAIKO token has surged as much as 136% in recent trading.

title: XRP edges higher as whale activity rises while retail traders stay cautious
summary: New wallet creation hit a three-month high and large-holder activity strengthened, but XRP still needs to reclaim $1.10 before the recovery looks convincing.

title: Bitcoin's long-term holders have returned to accumulation
summary: Long-term holding wallets have shifted to net accumulation from net distribution, according to Glassnode.

title: FBI Director Kash Patel caught sleeping on required disclosure of six-figure MSTR investment: Report
summary: Patel loaded up on BTC-holder MSTR shares but failed to file a timely disclosure, according to a report by nonpartisan news outlet NOTUS.

title: Ether, solana, dogecoin in the green after Warsh comments push bitcoin above $60,000
summary: Bitcoin climbed back above $60,000 for the first time in over a week after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh said inflation risks had come down. Solana led the majors, up about 16% on the week, while a semiconductor selloff hit Asian markets and dented the AI trade that has pulled capital from crypto all quarter.
